_comment: Upcoming content calendar. Used by calendar-slot to check for conflicts, deal-resourcing to align production tasks with publish targets, and content-distributor to track publishing status per platform.
_gitignore_note: Your real calendar entries go in content-calendar.local.json (gitignored, never overwritten by git pull). This committed file is the empty schema. calendar-slot checks .local.json first, then this file.

entry_schema.title: string
entry_schema.stage: idea | scripted | filmed | edited | scheduled | published

posts.status: queued | scheduled | published | failed | draft | manual_required
posts.connector_used: postiz_mcp | buffer_mcp | youtube_publishing | instagram_publishing | tiktok_publishing | pinterest_publishing | none
